title: There And Back Again: A Texas Pacific Bubble Story
text: Fundamentals always win out in the end, but price action can drive you crazy till then. The baby bubble of Texas Pacific Land Corporation matured into a fully-filled, helium offering in late 2022. But like the Bilbo Baggins story, we are now back to square one.

title: 2 Extraordinary Growth Stocks to Buy at a Discount
text: These two stocks are trading down 49% and 62% from their 52-week highs. Following these drops, both businesses trade at discounted valuations.

title: Texas Pacific (TPL) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
text: Texas Pacific (TPL) came out with quarterly earnings of $11.24 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $13.21 per share. This compares to earnings of $12.64 per share a year ago.

title: Why Earnings Season Could Be Great for Texas Pacific (TPL)
text: Texas Pacific (TPL) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
